历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 2798 → 3636 → 11446 → 4947. In 2024, due to batch merging, there was an abnormal drop to 11446, but it quickly rebounded to 4947 in 2025. Over the past three years, the overall trend shows a fluctuating shift. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 4947. The enrollment plan in this region was 8 students in 2022, and 13 students from 2023 to 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 13 students, consistent with 2025, indicating stable enrollment scale with no competitive changes due to expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 79th, with a stable ranking in the 75–80 range in recent years, belonging to the top 100 normal universities nationwide. The reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, involving only a controversy related to a film director, with no major negative public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 70th, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission cut-off drops or crashes, indicating stable application expectations. It has Psychology A+ (top in China), Marxist Theory A, Education A-, and Physical Education A-, totaling four A- or above disciplines. Its strength in normal disciplines strongly attracts candidates interested in teaching careers.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: South China Normal University is located in Guangzhou, Guangdong, far from Ningxia, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Its enrollment proportion in Ningxia is very small (about 0.2%–0.3%), so regional preference has limited impact on applications. The social popularity of normal/education majors from 2021 to 2024 shifted from differentiation/wait-and-see → recommendation → differentiation/wait-and-see → differentiation/wait-and-see. In 2024, the popularity index was about 55.84, showing a cooling trend. The total number of regular college entrance exam takers in this province for 2026 is approximately 66,000, a slight increase from 65,897 in 2025, with an estimated 44,220 in the Physics Category.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and shifting trend of historical rankings, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, a slight increase in total examinees, cooling popularity of normal majors, and stable reputation, competition is expected to intensify slightly based on the 2025 baseline of 4947. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 5000, with a range of 4500–5500.
